description: My overall experience with ALL Geo app has been a good one, I really love the ease of use, time tracking and the value for the money. Also every time we have an issue the customer service is quick to get a solution or make changes to the app to accommodate our company.
author: Ricardo B.
pros: I really enjoyed the ease of use of the all geo app, another noteworthy mention would be that is nice to see the location and of staff for employee management. The tracking works well on this app as well
cons: At times the clock in and out can be a tad bit to work with. Occasionally it will clock staff in or out depending on what their clocking in or out status is. Not a deal breaker and I'm sure the ALL GEO team is working on a solution.

description: I am very please with our experience and I would recommend this product to others.
author: Allan A.
pros: I enjoy that this platform includes all of the features that myself and my company were looking for. Most others services included some but not all of the features that allGeo advertised.
cons: The platform needed to be a bit customized to fit our requirements when in my opinion, they were basic requirements that most other platforms already had built into their systems. That said, customer service was excellent and tailored this to us and really help us throughout the entire process.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: We were trying to use this as a way to track our employees for dispatching efficiency and safety but we have realized NO BENEFITS.
author: Azaria K.
pros: Nothing - I can not think of a single thing good to say about this software
cons: 1- I can not get the system to work reliably for any amount of time does not matter the operating system or the brand of phone - iPhone, Android it does not matter. We have tried multiple times working with tech support to get them working and nothing has changed. It does not matter how many times you verify, update no one phone stays active consistently. 2 - I have no clue what the administrator screen is sorting by but when you try and sort by another column as soon as you refresh the screen it reverts back. 3 - We have been trying to get the same 5 phones initialized since May and they are still not. Every time we launch a complaint, tech support comes back with some obscure solution that works for 2.5 seconds and then breaks. 4 - We made a deal with them to purchase all our licences upfront and it worked for 4 months and the rest of the time has been us trying with all our might to get them working again.

author: Brandon F.
pros: The breadcrumb report tracks location of vehicle.
cons: System usability isn't always intuitive; original alerts were annoying and had to email support to stop them
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall our experience with AllGeo has been wonderful. There were a few hiccups along the way, but the AllGeo team made sure that their product was working the way we needed it to. We are a happy customer!
author: Faron N.
pros: Customer Support is top notch and available instantly through the chat feature whenever needed. Product and reporting is flexible to accommodate our business needs. AllGeo team provides great support during implementation and is willing to work with you to solve any problems that arise.
cons: Geofencing entry/exit works very well but could be more precise. Historic time tracking data for devices cannot be transferred from one phone number to another.

review_title: Robust & Sometimtes Intimidating, but with the Customer Service it will get done
author: Kari G.
pros: The most impactful features are time-keeping, active tracking, and location reporting that helps us with job costing. The time-keeping is helping us eliminate paper timesheets and eliminates a lot of human error once staff gets used to clocking in. The active tracking allows us to understand where our team is and to more efficiently operate. Part of the tracking actually determines how much time is spent at each property and that allows us to do job costing for each of our properties.
cons: Although, I have run into features that don't necessarily fit our business the AllGeo team has been able to help modify them to better suit us! Which is a form of flexibility I don't think is very common among different services. AllGeo is not the most intuitive and I do wish there was training since I want to be able to do the functions on my own, but I am incredibly thankful for the customer service team. They have been incredibly patient with all my questions about our setup.

review_title: Easy to access the Time clock and GPS tracking is the best
author: Srinivas B.
pros: Easy to use no need to spend time to train employee Real Time GPS Tracking Reasonable cost Top customer service
cons: No. of location sites are limited Sometime shows wrong location

description: The mobile software wasn't as easy to use for me or my employees. Also, the phone tracking features weren't always correct, especially if we had customer job near each other. The main complaint I had from my employees was that the app "drained" the phone battery quickly (we set the tracking to every 15 min). Therefore, if the employees can't keep their phone charged it doesn't work as intended.
author: Scott H.
pros: It's easy to set up and use. The website is laid out very nice.
cons: The reports and the mobile software. I would have liked to be able to customize my reports. The mobile software was difficult and I couldn't edit my notes.

description: Overall the system is great, the customer service is stellar and it makes my job so much easier.
author: James T.
pros: This program is a quick and easy way to track our employees hours. The customized visit record time sheets they developed for our company makes it easy to keep up with our employees' performance for company compliance. The app is easy for our tech challenged employees to use as well.
cons: Its a little expensive. But not too much where we would consider leaving.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Allows for automatic time tracking system. When leaving a location it will record when leaving and the address.
cons: Sometimes the application is not accurate and it will send daily reminders to turn on the tracker even though it is on.

description: My experience has been overwhelmingly positive. I appreciate that the team at allGeo is super responsive and ready to assist. I tested this product from day one, implemented it's use, and administer our account. My questions have always been answered promptly, training was provided to me with set up, and I can rely on the team to provide support. Thank you!
author: Kim S.
pros: The reporting features, customer service and reliability.
cons: Nothing. If I do not understand a new feature, an answer is a just quick email, chat window or phone call away.

description: I am responsible for holding 16 marketers across the nation accountable for their daily activity.
author: David Y.
pros: I like the fact that it automatically documents the time and GPS address on every entry.
cons: We do not have any complaints we are happy.

description: Not Good. I am currently looking for another app to replace this
author: Mike H.
pros: I like what it is suppose to do.... It however is to hard to get the information needed.
cons: The inability to track the phones without updating daily

author: Gladys T.
pros: That i am able to track our employee and pull out reports to provide to our client.
cons: Is not that easy to manuever. But it's good either way

description: It does the job, and it is well supported
author: Frederic H.
pros: Having a source to go back to in case a problem develops
cons: The additional cost to add addresses, we have loads of customers, so it makes it costly to add more

author: Joshua G.
pros: I like using this software for tracking and monitor field employees. This is good for our purposes, but also for allowing the technician to verify where they are at any given time.
cons: I would really like to see the ability to have special locations in different colors

description: Great experience, software has helped streamline payroll by providing virtual time lock. No lost hours
author: Scott D.
pros: Geofencing for timeclock, helps maximize hours by our service team and prevent shrink
cons: Some updates required fir different iOS

author: Lenora K.
pros: Cost effective, and does exactly what we needed. Pretty good support as well.
cons: Takes a bit of understanding to use reports and such, but once you get the hang of it, it's pretty easy.

description: works well [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] and his team is awesome
author: Sati M.
pros: tracking is great . customer service is great as well
cons: I have no complaints . I will keep using this service

review_title: Helped me much more accurately track my employee.
description: They were very responsive anytime I had a concern or problem.
author: Keith A.
pros: It was easy to set up in years and is inexpensive way for me to monitor my workers location and hours on the job. He moves between 20 different sites.
cons: I gave my employee an old phone that didn’t work well. Ended up buying a $50 Smart phone with good battery life. And now it works perfectly

review_title: Construction Company not an option on the first page
author: Leigh N.
pros: Tracking employees and the time logs.
cons: Employee's location is on but the app still needs refreshing constantly because it isn't reading.

review_title: i would recommend this to everyone, i actually do
author: WILKINS P.
pros: i would recommend this to everyone, i actually do, so easy to use once you have gotten the hang of it, also they are super helpful

author: Tracy B.
pros: This software was fun to use. I enjoyed using it.
cons: A little confusing to figure out some of the features.

author: Al M.
pros: The company has great customer support. They even reach out to help before you have to ask.
cons: It can be a bit clunky. it is not always obvious what the information is based on.

description: Was trying to use myGeoTracking to replace a "punch" timecard system.
author: Daniel S.
pros: Lots of features. More than I will ever need.
cons: Requires user to "clock in" and "clock out" on the app. This leads to problems. It should have been automatic based on user's loction.
